sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50656" key="i(/ppagros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἵππ-αγρος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἵππος ἄγριος</foreign>, <sense id="n50656.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wild horse</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:252" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.252</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
